name: INOX Leisure Limited
summary: INOX Leisure Limited operates and manages multiplexes and cinema theatres under the INOX brand name in India. As of February 20, 2021, it operated 152 multiplexes and 643 screens in 69 cities. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Mumbai, India. INOX Leisure Limited is a subsidiary of Gujarat Fluorochemicals Limited.
